current_commit_message: Tokenizer: handle basic formatting and headings
Test: add a complex wikitext fixture
Make clean and tokenize simple functions
TestTokenizer: add a test case with duplicated tokens
WikipediaDump: use a proper dump URL
BaseDump | raise an exception and do not set a cache entry
DumpError | raise when we fail to fetch a dump
WikiaDump | use libarchive-c instead of py7zlib
DumpReader: when parsing is completed log the number of pages found
DumpReader | emit revision ID and timestamp for each page
Do not be so strict on pinned depedencies
reader.py: Consider using {} instead of dict()
dumps.py: Using open without explicitly specifying an encoding
Use pytest-cov and report code coverage (threshold set to %91)
Be less strict on prod dependencies
State clearly that we require Python 3.7+ (#118)
Reading dumps from local files: document and test it (#226)
Introduce the IteratorDump for reading the XML dump as a stream (#227)
Update tests.yml: drop support for Python 3.8 and test under 3.12 and 3.13 (#268)
